name: chr7p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 7 p-arm pericentric flank (7p11.1-7p11.2), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr7 centromere. Alpha-satellite (D7Z1/D7Z2), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Distally connects to the 7p11.2 EGFR locus. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR (dual D7Z1/D7Z2) + HSat patches + Horvath/She pericentromeric SD shoreline.
